task: READ-ONLY final focused validation after fixes. Inspect current Bar.qml and StatusData.qml. Verify: all overlays except workspaces render only on their target monitor; keyboard and per-monitor click/wheel activation choose the correct monitor; moving open Wi-Fi/Bluetooth to another monitor performs full cleanup while preserving in-flight Bluetooth native action state; deferred Wi-Fi scans cannot resurrect; all widget show functions end mutually exclusive; top anchoring prevents tall→short content drift. Do not edit. Report blockers/medium issues only, or CLEAN.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Bar.qml:19-42,185-340 scopes rendering and keyboard focus by target monitor; StatusData.qml:460-725 provides monitor resolution, mutual exclusion, Wi-Fi cleanup/generation guards, and Bluetooth action preservation.

commandsRun.command: git status --short; git diff HEAD -- Bar.qml StatusData.qml
commandsRun.summary: Inspected repository state and complete focused diff.

commandsRun.command: nl -ba Bar.qml StatusData.qml with focused ranges
commandsRun.summary: Verified monitor predicates, activation paths, cleanup, mutual exclusion, and top anchors.
qmllint was unavailable in the environment.

validationOutput: Bar.qml:22-42 gates every non-workspace overlay and exclusive keyboard focus by its target monitor.
Bar.qml:121-154 and 397-413 pass the originating monitor for per-monitor clicks and wheel events.
StatusData.qml:460-467 resolves keyboard/IPC calls to the focused monitor.
StatusData.qml:610-703 fully resets Wi-Fi state and uses visibility plus generation checks to prevent deferred scan resurrection.
StatusData.qml:713-733 cleans up Bluetooth presentation/discovery while retaining bluetoothActionDevice, bluetoothAction, and its timer.
StatusData.qml:477-492, 497-507, 567-600, 610-624, 713-726, and 899-908 preserve overlay mutual exclusion.
Bar.qml:202-205 and 237-340 top-anchor the morph container and all content, preventing tall-to-short vertical drift.
residualRisks: No live multi-monitor Quickshell session was available; validation was static.
QML linting could not run because qmllint was unavailable.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only focused validation of current Bar.qml and StatusData.qml; no files changed.
childReport.manualNotes: Repository already contains staged and unstaged changes unrelated to this read-only review.
